summary: API Keys & Sync system fully tested. Backend: 24/24 tests PASSED - All CRUD operations, sync endpoints, auth rejection, and usage tracking work correctly. Frontend: All features verified - sidebar link, API Keys page, endpoint docs, key creation dialog with security warning and copy functionality.

issues: PostHog and Cloudflare Insights scripts blocked - not critical, affects analytics only

critical_code_review_comments: sync.py line 84: Fixed bug - webhook_url handling when value is None (was calling .strip() on None)
sync.py lines 36-52: validate_api_key properly validates key hash and updates last_used_at + usage_count
sync.py lines 75-111: create_api_key generates secure si_ prefixed key, stores only hash, returns raw key once
sync.py lines 114-123: list_api_keys correctly excludes key_hash and _id from response
sync.py lines 126-149: update_api_key supports name, webhook_url, is_active toggle
sync.py lines 197-269: All 4 sync endpoints properly validate API key before returning data
ApiKeysPage.jsx lines 59-78: Key creation flow correctly displays raw key with security warning
ApiKeysPage.jsx lines 175-207: Endpoint documentation card displays all 4 sync endpoints
AdminLayout.jsx line 74: API Keys & Sync nav item with Key icon and pageId 'api-keys'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing API keys in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Keys & Sync system fully functional. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/api-keys for admin CRUD, GET /api/sync/products|styling/{id}|measurements|all for external sync with X-API-Key header. API keys use si_ prefix, are hashed for storage. Fixed: webhook_url None handling bug in sync.py line 84.

bug_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'strip' when webhook_url is None
bug_fixed.severity: HIGH - was causing 500 errors on key creation without webhook URL
